name: SF2B tail cutter origin intent remains unresolved after evasion

source.purpose: A tail/contact thread that asks who or why cannot resolve cleanly from temporary evasion or contact geometry alone.

thread_spine.title: Contact in Wake
thread_spine.resolutionCriteria: Identify who owns the cutter in your wake and why it is tracking the sealed cargo.
thread_spine.failureMode: The unknown contact chooses the time and lane of interception.
thread_spine.retrievalCue: wake contact, cutter silhouette, unknown owner or intent

input.playerInput: Cut engines cold and drift behind the ore screen until the cutter loses us.

narrator.prose: The cutter's sensor fan passes over empty wake. For the moment, it cannot see you.

transitions.reason: The cutter cannot see the ship after the evasion drift.
